function.rulebook_notes: Completed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system per root policy, read nested AGENTS.MD in finance folders, and used exact invoice line items.
function.outcome_justification: The three invoices containing the exact line item were read. Only invoices issued on/after 2026-02-01 qualify: INV-0008 line_eur 220 and INV-0011 line_eur 160. Their sum is 380; INV-0007 line_eur 110 is dated 2026-01-19 and excluded.
